/CAL: SENTENCE//TWS/CH1:ISS:PROB 3 Y:PJ60D/CTS:4/X: THE COURT WILL NOT REMAND THE DEFENDANT TODAY TO SERVE THE 60 DAYS COUNTY JAIL, BUT WILL CONTINUE THE MATTER FORA DOMESTIC VIOLENCE PROGRESS REPORT/CTORD: 60 DAY COUNTY JAIL SENTENCE ISSTAYED PENDING DEFENDANT COMPLIANCE WITH DOMESTIC VIOLENCE COUNSELING,/X:COURT DETERMINED THERE IS NO RESTITUTION OWED IN THIS MATTER,/IND/DOMVF1:500/DOMV2:52 WEEKS/COMUN:25/VF2:150/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/CTORD: DEFENDANTSHALL PAY PROBATION COSTS SET AT AN AMOUNT OF $25 PER MONTH,/CTORD: DEFENDANT MAY REPORT-CHECK IN WIT HTHE ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT BY TELEPHONE AND BY LETTER,/DEF: ADVISED ON RIGHTS/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/CCC: INCOUNTS 2 AND 3/X:WITNESS MELISSA REMIREZ IS SWORN AND TESTIFIES/X: NOTICEOF TERMINATION OF PROTECTIVE ORDER IN CRIMINAL PROCEEDING SIGNEDAND FILED/X: ORDER ISSUED 09-30-13 IS TERMINATED,/X: ORDER SIGNED AND FILED/BE/CONTD PROGRESS REPORT - DV DOP/CONTD: DOMESTIC VIOLENCE PROGRESS REPORT OR SURRENDER 04-15-15 IN DEPT 22/DOP/
